title: murdannia axillaris
intro: Murdannia axillaris, also known as 'Blue Dew Mallow', is a type of flowering plant belonging to the family Commelinaceae. It is native to tropical and subtropical regions of Asia and is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and soothing respiratory problems. Murdannia axillaris is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion for herbal remedies, often used in traditional Asian medicine to treat various ailments.
